benefits.description: Expecting fat loss from HGH but water retention is masking results

side_effects.description: Significant water retention from microdose HGH despite being in caloric deficit. Water retention seems to prevent visible fat loss results despite continued caloric deficit.

protocol_notes: User is on caloric deficit and refeeds. Currently using HGH on and off for approximately one month. Tried mitigation strategies: 3g potassium daily, 5g taurine daily, dandelion root (caused skin dryness). Also tried 5g salt per day in 4 liters of water which caused temporary bloating (~1 week). Does not use creatine due to similar water retention issues. Considering every-other-day dosing to manage water retention between doses. Mentions gynecomastia as separate condition. Does not use glucosamine for same reason (water retention).
